# Native Simple P DF Fixture

### Strata Reader Proj ect

May 2026

## 1 Introduction

This is a native simple PDF file used to verify the baseline text extraction of the Strata-Reader engine . It contains standard characters , a single column layout , and basic section headings .

### 1.1 Basic Features

The extraction should retrieve this text with high fidelity, preserving word groupings and basic reading order from top to bottom .
